sn48.13:1.1:
1
"Bhikkhus, there are these five faculties. What five? The faculty of faith … the faculty of wisdom. These are the five faculties.
sn48.13:1.2: "One who has completed and fulfilled these five faculties is an arahant. If they are weaker than that, one is a nonreturner … a once-returner … a stream-enterer … a Dhamma-follower … a faith-follower.
sn48.13:1.3:
"Thus, bhikkhus, due to a difference in the faculties there is a difference in the fruits; due to a difference in the fruits
there is a difference among persons."
